title: Egyptian Night Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic tagine recipe made with Egyptian spices, night shade-free ingredients, and served with crusty bread.

ingredients.name: night
ingredients.amount: 1 cup chopped (use eggplant or portobello mushrooms as substitute)
ingredients.notes: Note: Use a night shade-free option if necessary.

instructions: Heat oil in a large clay tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, cooking until softened.
Add cumin, coriander, and paprika, cooking for 1 minute.
Add night and tagine, cooking for 5 minutes.
Add dates and salt, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
Simmer over low heat for 20-25 minutes or until the flavors have melded together and the night is tender.
Serve hot with crusty bread, garnished with fresh herbs.
